activities.instructions: Choose the form for the event that happened first.
activities.prompt: When we arrived, the concert ___.
activities.explanation: El concierto empezó antes de nuestra llegada: «had started».

activities.instructions: Choose the form that explains the later situation.
activities.prompt: I was hungry because I ___ breakfast.
activities.explanation: No desayunar ocurrió antes y explica el hambre posterior.

activities.instructions: Choose the correct irregular participle.
activities.prompt: She had ___ home before the meeting ended.
activities.explanation: Después de «had» usamos el participio «gone».

activities.instructions: Choose the correctly formed past perfect question.
activities.prompt: Ask whether the driver saw the warning before the incident.

options.text: Had the driver seen the warning?
Did the driver had seen the warning?
Had the driver saw the warning?
Has the driver seen the warning yesterday?

activities.explanation: La pregunta usa «Had + sujeto + participio»: «seen».

activities.instructions: Choose the form for a result completed before a past deadline.
activities.prompt: By noon, we ___ the inspection.
activities.explanation: «By noon» marca un límite pasado antes del cual se completó el trabajo.

activities.instructions: Choose the form with natural adverb placement.
activities.prompt: When I called Omar, he ___ the news.
activities.explanation: La noticia llegó antes de la llamada; «already» va después de «had».

activities.instructions: Choose the form for an event immediately before another past event.
activities.prompt: The guests ___ when our taxi arrived.
activities.explanation: La salida ocurrió inmediatamente antes de la llegada del taxi.

activities.instructions: Choose the form for experience before a past point.
activities.prompt: Before that trip, Nora ___ in a plane.
activities.explanation: La ausencia de experiencia se mide hasta un viaje pasado.

activities.instructions: Choose the form that explains why payment was impossible.
activities.prompt: We couldn't pay because I ___ my wallet at home.
activities.explanation: Dejar la cartera ocurrió antes del intento de pagar.

activities.instructions: Choose the form that explains the condition of the path.
activities.prompt: The path was slippery because it ___ overnight.
activities.explanation: La lluvia nocturna fue anterior al estado resbaladizo del camino.

activities.instructions: Choose the sentence meaning that Maya was already absent.
activities.prompt: Which sentence says Maya left before my arrival?

options.text: When I arrived, Maya had left.
When I had arrived, Maya has left.
When I arrived, Maya had leave.

activities.explanation: «Had left» sitúa la salida antes de «arrived».

activities.instructions: Choose the natural tense sequence without unnecessary past perfect.
activities.prompt: The actions happened in this order: open the door, enter, switch on the light.

options.text: I opened the door, entered and switched on the light.
I had opened the door, had entered and had switched on the light.
I had open the door, entered and switch on the light.
I have opened the door, entered and switched on the light yesterday.

activities.explanation: Una secuencia cronológica completa no necesita past perfect.

activities.instructions: Choose the natural form for a sequence already ordered by «after».
activities.prompt: After I locked the door, I ___ towards the station.
activities.explanation: «After» ya aclara el orden y la acción siguiente usa past simple.

activities.instructions: Choose the form that marks leaving as earlier than returning.
activities.prompt: I returned to check the door after I ___ the building.
activities.explanation: La salida fue anterior al regreso y se marca con «had left».

activities.instructions: Choose the form completed before the doors opened.
activities.prompt: By the time the doors opened, a long queue ___.
activities.explanation: La cola ya existía al llegar al límite pasado.

activities.instructions: Choose the form that describes a mistaken earlier belief.
activities.prompt: I thought I ___ the document, but the folder was empty.
activities.explanation: El supuesto guardado era anterior al pensamiento y al descubrimiento.

activities.instructions: Choose the form for a state continuing up to a past point.
activities.prompt: They ___ each other for years before they worked together.
activities.explanation: «Know» es de estado y la relación existía antes del trabajo conjunto.

activities.instructions: Choose the form for an event one second before another past event.
activities.prompt: The lift ___ a second before we entered it.
activities.explanation: Aunque la diferencia es mínima, la parada ocurrió antes de la entrada.

activities.instructions: Choose the forms that introduce an earlier cause and a later response.
activities.prompt: The server ___ overnight, so the technician ___ it before the office opened.
activities.explanation: El fallo es anterior al marco narrativo; la reparación hace avanzar la historia.

activities.instructions: Choose the form for something still pending at a past point.
activities.prompt: At noon, the replacement parcel ___ yet.
activities.explanation: La llegada seguía pendiente al alcanzar el punto pasado de mediodía.

activities.instructions: Choose the form identifying the origin of an item found later.
activities.prompt: I opened the box and found the part that the supplier ___.
activities.explanation: El proveedor envió la pieza antes de que yo abriera la caja.

activities.instructions: Choose the forms that distinguish an earlier cause from a past discovery.
activities.prompt: We ___ the wrong path, so we ___ the village from the opposite direction.
activities.explanation: Tomar el camino equivocado explica cómo llegamos después.

activities.instructions: Choose the sequence that moves back once and then narrates events normally.
activities.prompt: Lena explained why she was late: first she had missed a bus; after that she called and waited.

options.text: She had missed the bus, so she called us and waited for the next one.
She had missed the bus, so she had called us and had waited for the next one.
She has missed the bus, so she called us and waits.
She had miss the bus, so she did called us.

activities.explanation: Past perfect abre el retroceso; los eventos posteriores siguen en past simple.

activities.instructions: Choose the correctly formed question about experience before a course.
activities.prompt: Ask whether Ravi had used the software before the training began.

options.text: Had Ravi used the software before the training began?
Did Ravi had used the software before the training began?
Had Ravi use the software before the training began?
Has Ravi used the software before the training began last year?

activities.explanation: La pregunta sobre el pasado anterior usa «Had Ravi used ...?».

activities.instructions: Choose the version that avoids unnecessary past perfect.
activities.prompt: The actions happened in their stated order: scan the ticket, enter the hall, find a seat.

options.text: I scanned my ticket, entered the hall and found my seat.
I had scanned my ticket, had entered the hall and had found my seat.
I had scan my ticket, entered the hall and had find my seat.
I have scanned my ticket and entered the hall yesterday.

activities.explanation: La secuencia cronológica se cuenta de forma natural con past simple.
